description: Find sharded CB aliasing in generic_op

detail: Same-spec sharded tilize = full zero-copy compute-only: alias cb_rm_in onto RM input shard (page_size override to tile_size), alias cb_tiled_out onto TILE output shard, compute self-pushes input then tilize packs straight into output shard. RM shard is contiguous 32x(Wt*32) blocks = exactly what tilize_block consumes. Orientation/scheme-agnostic since each core tilizes its own local block. Precedent: examples/compute_block_size _tile_paged_backed_cb + reduce_block compute-only self-push.

Native general default factory uses NO cross-core semaphores/multicast: each compute core reads its assigned tile-rows as RM sticks via TensorAccessor (resolves to DRAM or remote L1 shard banks) + tilize + writes tiles via TensorAccessor. Single general path handles crossover/cross-spec/nd->legacy. Reader needs num_pages_in_row for width-split sharded input.
